messages.content: html page with one button. By pressing the button, it adds a new div with the buttons text and a qr-code. The new div will be 300px width and 150px height.
how about the javascript?
script tag for the qr code library

You can add the following `<script>` tag in your HTML file to include the qr.js library for generating QR codes.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/qrious"></script>
``` 

Make sure to add this `<script>` tag before your custom script in the HTML file.

My apologies for the oversight. Here is an updated version that includes the qr.js library from a local file instead: ```html QR Code Generator
``` In the updated code, I assume that you have downloaded the qr.js library and saved it as "qr.min.js" in the same directory as the HTML file. This way, the QR code library can be included from a local file.

i copied the html and the js, it doesn't work

To ensure the code works as expected, let's try to simplify it by using a different approach to generate QR codes without the need for any external libraries. We can leverage the `QRCode.js` library which can be added directly to the project. Here's how you can modify your HTML and JavaScript files: HTML file (index.html): ```html QR Code Generator
``` JavaScript file (script.js): ```javascript // script.js document.getElementById("generateBtn").addEventListener("click", function() { var qrText = this.textContent; // Button's text will be used as the text for the QR code var qrCodeDiv = document.createElement("div"); qrCodeDiv.style.width = "300px"; qrCodeDiv.style.height = "150px"; // Create QR code using QRCode.js library var qrCode = new QRCode(qrCodeDiv, qrText); document.getElementById("qrCodesContainer").appendChild(qrCodeDiv); }); ``` Please make sure to download the `QRCode.js` library and place it in the same directory as your HTML file. This version uses the QRCode.js library directly to generate the QR codes without relying on external resources.

Just plain HTML page with one button please

Here is a simple HTML page with just one button:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Simple HTML Page</title>
</head>
<body>

<button id="generateBtn">Click Me</button>

</body>
</html>
```

This HTML page contains a button with the text "Click Me".
